text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Rent Payment Assistance * Homelessness Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Disaster/Emergency Issues Domestic Violence Issues Domestic Violence Issues * African American Community Domestic Violence Issues * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Families with Children Hispanic/Latino Community Homeless Veterans Homelessness Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals Medicaid Recipients Mental Health Issues Older Adults Pregnant Individuals Sexual Assault Issues Slavic Community Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SIUSLAW OUTREACH SERVICES SIUSLAW AREA RESOURCE CENTER RENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent assistance to prevent homelessness. Assistance is based on available funding and is not guaranteed. 1536 W 12th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Income restrictions. Must be unstably housed or at imminent risk of homelessness to qualify. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-3:30pm, Friday 10am-4pm Email (541) 997-2816 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SIUSLAW OUTREACH SERVICES RENT ASSISTANCE
